meaning: [鸟]维达鸟,寡妇鸟(暗色长尾的非洲鸟)
examples: As a result, the Whydah sank near the northeast coast of the US.
It is said that Black Sam's ship, the Whydah, held about four and a half tons of silver and gold.
The sea swallowed the Whydah along with her treasure, yet the fascinating saga of this storied ship was far from over.
Named Whydah, after the 1700s ship of pirate "Black Sam" Bellamy, the home took four years to build and was finished earlier this month.
